# skillissue.sh

> Jack Arturo's personal/agent skills collection. Skills that earn their keep across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and AutoHub.

## Site

- Home: https://skillissue.sh/
- Machine catalog: https://skillissue.sh/skills.json
- Source: https://github.com/jack-arturo/skillissue
- Typo alias: https://skilissue.sh/ (same site)

## What this is

Not a marketplace. Not a registry. A public window onto the skills Jack actually runs — the ones that survived use, got vaulted, and stay in rotation. Install via AutoVault or the Skills CLI; load them through your agent's normal skill directory.

## Featured skills

- jacks-writing-style — write like Jack (direct, casual, technical)
- find-skills — discover installable agent skills
- cloudflare-ops — Cloudflare Pages/Workers/D1 deploy ops
- dev-browser — drive real authenticated Chrome
- skill-author — package skills for AutoVault

## Full catalog

See https://skillissue.sh/skills.json for names, categories, tags, and descriptions.

## Voice

Dry, technical, lightly humorous. The domain pun ("skill issue") is intentional and not explained at length.
